_source: FPFH Planetfall Tokens 15mm V2.eps (Modiphius official art delivery, Dec 2025)
_public_distribution_note: Modiphius makes these available as a free PDF at www.fiveparsecs.com (per Planetfall rulebook line 716)

poison.description: Slow-acting nerve toxin trait applied by certain lifeforms

aid.rules_source: Planetfall expansion line 2872, also Core Rules Aid action
aid.description: Aid marker on an ally; may apply -1 to incoming hit, remove a Stun, or be cashed in

objective.rules_source: Planetfall expansion line 2442, Core Rules mission setup
objective.description: Mission goal marker; enemies typically ignore unless the mission dictates otherwise

activated.description: Character has acted this round; cannot be activated again

cloud.rules_source: Planetfall expansion line 8254 (Drifting Clouds battlefield condition)
cloud.description: Cloud marker, 2" radius, drifts D6" per round; Safe / Toxic / Corrosive variants

discovery_recon.description: Investigation mission objective (move within 2") OR Recon mission objective (base contact + Savvy 5+)

delaying.description: Quick Action delay marker; player opted to roll fewer dice than allowed

stunned.rules_source: Core Rules p.46 Toughness save, Planetfall line 2634
stunned.description: Stun marker from failed Toughness save; Move OR Combat (not both); 3+ = Out of Action

contact.rules_source: Planetfall expansion lines 1983, 8423; Compendium Bug Hunt rules
contact.description: Unknown lifeform marker placed during Enemy Phase; revealed by approach or line of sight

delve_device.description: Delve mission objective; base contact + action triggers D6 result table

delve_hazard.description: Delve mission threat; 4 placed per game; revealed within 3" + LOS triggers 18-result D100 effect table

sprawling.description: Knocked Sprawling marker (falls 3"+, certain enemy effects); cleared via Recovery action
